business_description.nature_of_business: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction — healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania

coverages_discussed.notes: Policy number WC-KCB-2025-5580; effective date 08/01/2025; prior carrier for 2024 policy year with 13 claims and no cancellations
2022 policy year; 4 claims; policy was cancelled

positives: Formal safety program in place (answered Yes to question 6)
OSHA 300 logs maintained and regular job-site safety audits conducted
Formal return-to-work / modified duty program in place
42 years in business with 28 years under current management
425 full-time employees reflecting stable, established workforce
Four of five locations are fully sprinklered
Annual revenue of $95M demonstrates financial scale and stability
concerns: Hazardous materials used or encountered in operations
Certificates of insurance NOT required from subcontractors before work begins
Hold-harmless agreements NOT obtained from subcontractors
No written contracts maintained with all subcontractors
40% of work performed by subcontractors, increasing third-party exposure
Policy cancelled by Zurich Insurance Group in 2022
LOC-005 (100 Dutilh Road, Cranberry Township) warehouse is not sprinklered
LOC-003 (4520 Butler Street) manufacturing facility built in 1988 — oldest location
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Three-year loss history shows a significant upward trend in claim frequency: 4 claims in 2022 (Zurich, $1,369,245.71 premium — policy cancelled), 10 claims in 2023 (Berkshire Hathaway Guard, $1,476,849.96 premium — no cancellation), and 13 claims in 2024 (Nationwide Insurance, $1,634,721.63 premium — no cancellation). Total claims over three years: 27. Premiums have increased year-over-year commensurate with claim activity.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction — healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania. Hours of operation: Mon-Fri 7:00 AM - 3:30 PM. 40% of work performed by subcontractors. Three largest projects in past 3 years: 1) $1.2M restaurant build-out, 2) $800K medical office renovation, 3) $650K church addition. Operations performed above 4 stories. Demolition or blasting operations are performed.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Formal safety program in place. OSHA 300 logs maintained and regular job-site safety audits conducted. Formal return-to-work / modified duty program in place. Formal written safety program exists. Hazardous materials are used or encountered in operations. Certificates of insurance are NOT required from subcontractors before work begins. Hold-harmless agreements are NOT obtained from subcontractors.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: 2022 — Zurich Insurance Group: 4 claims, premium $1,369,245.71, policy cancelled. 2023 — Berkshire Hathaway Guard: 10 claims, premium $1,476,849.96, no cancellation. 2024 — Nationwide Insurance: 13 claims, premium $1,634,721.63, no cancellation.
